# CloudPipelines
> 2026 Infrastructure & FinOps Audit platform helping mid-market firms reduce cloud waste.

## Core Services
- [Infrastructure Audit](https://cloudpipelines.com/index.html): Independent assessment of resource over-provisioning and security gaps.
- [Cloud Optimization](https://cloudpipelines.com/success.html): Managed migration paths to Google Cloud C3D infrastructure.

## Targeted Audience
CTOs, FinOps leads, and DevOps engineers looking to reduce annual cloud spend by up to 30%.
